title: Hyperliquid - DPRK Hack Attempt
relevance_summary: Validator compromise attempt on a DeFi protocol with significant TVL

prevention.rule: Block any tx that attempts to modify validator signatures or configurations.
prevention.trigger: MODIFY_VALIDATOR_SIGNATURES -> validator configuration change in single tx

red_flags: Unusual trading activity by known malicious actors
Multiple DPRK-linked addresses testing system boundaries
monitoring_rules: Monitor for any tx attempting to modify validator signatures or configurations
summary: North Korean hackers tested Hyperliquid's defenses by probing its validators, potentially aiming for a multi-billion dollar exploit. A security expert warned of the risks, but the protocol's response dismissed the concerns.
